MASONRY EXPERTS

Philadelphia's Trusted Masonry Experts

Horizon Masonry delivers durable brick and stonework for Philly's historic homes. We tackle freeze-thaw damage, row house repairs, and modern masonry needs with precision.

What We Do

SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Built on Brick and Pride

Founded in 2012, Horizon Masonry grew from a two-man crew repairing Fishtown stoops to a 20+ team preserving Philadelphia's architectural legacy. We've laid every brick type from colonial reds to modern thin veneers.

Our masons train for two years before touching client projects. We use heritage techniques for historic homes and engineered solutions for new construction - always with locally sourced materials when possible.

When winter ice cracks your chimney or summer storms damage mortar joints, we're the crew your neighbors call. Sponsor of the Manayunk Arts Festival and volunteer rebuilders after the 2023 Kensington warehouse fire.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Horizon Masonry

Freeze-Thaw Specialists

We replace damaged brick with materials rated for Philadelphia's 40° winter swings.

Row House Whisperers

Know every quirk of shared walls, stepped foundations, and century-old mortar mixes.

No Surprise Pricing

Fixed-rate quotes include hidden structural repairs common in older Philly homes.

Permit Pros

Handle all historic district approvals and L&I inspections so you don't have to.

Your Walls Deserve This Attention

Schedule a free masonry evaluation - we'll show you what's failing and why.

Get a Free Estimate Call 555-mas-r90

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

The team saved my 1890s Queen Village row house from disaster. They discovered previous contractors had used cement mortar that was forcing bricks to spall. Their lime mortar mix matched the original perfectly and their scaffolding system didn't damage my delicate ironwork. Two winters later - zero new cracks.

Marcus T. Historic Brick Repointing
“

After the 2024 ice storm left my Chestnut Hill chimney leaning dangerously, Horizon not only rebuilt it but improved the draft with a properly sized flue liner. They salvaged 90% of my original stone and even replicated the unusual owl nesting ledge that's been there since the 1920s. Passed L&I inspection on first try.

Eleanor R. Chimney Rebuilding
“

Our Northern Liberties alley was a mud pit every rainstorm. Horizon designed a permeable paver system that handles delivery truck weight while meeting Philly's stormwater rules. The herringbone pattern makes our tiny courtyard look twice as big. Neighbors keep asking who did the work.

Devon P. Brick Paver Installation
“

The cracks in our Manayunk basement walls were growing visibly each year. Horizon installed helical piers and lime grout that stopped movement without altering the historic character. Their crew worked around our weird schedule and left the site cleaner than they found it. Finally no more winter drafts!

Gina L. Stone Foundation Repair
“

Our 70s-era Roxborough fireplace looked like a motel lobby disaster. Horizon rebuilt the firebox to code and created a stunning limestone surround with hidden log storage. They even matched the original mid-century brass screen we wanted to keep. First contractor who actually listened to our vision.

Raj B. Fireplace Refacing
“

Five contractors told me my East Passyunk basement would always be damp. Horizon excavated down to the footer (in February no less!), installed proper drainage, and used a breathable parging system. First dry spring in 12 years of ownership. Worth every penny.

Tasha W. Parging & Waterproofing

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

Will repointing make my brick walls stronger?
Proper repointing restores original load-bearing capacity by eliminating voids. We reinforce with hidden stainless pins only where absolutely necessary to avoid altering historic fabric.
How messy is the process?
We contain dust with negative air systems and protect landscaping with heavy-duty tarps. Most clients are surprised how clean the site stays.
Can you match my unusual mortar color?
Our library includes 47 historic Philadelphia mortar samples. For rare pigments like the purple-tinted mortar found in some Queen Village homes, we work with local labs to recreate exact formulations.
